meta.title: Products & Services — PT Victorindo Kimiatama
meta.description: Comprehensive coating systems engineered for performance and durability: Blinken, Steelux, Dankdeutz, Viktronox, Maxtrak, and Velora.

hero.heading: Our Product Portfolio
hero.lede: Comprehensive coating systems engineered for performance and durability — specialized solutions across three distinct industry verticals.

categories.heading: Automotive Paints
categories.lede: High-performance paint systems engineered for automotive bodyshops, bus karoseri manufacturers, and OEM assembly operations.

products.name: BLINKEN
products.desc: BLINKEN delivers superior color and long-lasting protection for modern vehicle finishing standards.
products.imageAlt: Blinken Clear Coat Polyurethane can being filled on the VK production line

products.name: STEELUX
products.desc: Steelux delivers high-quality automotive paint and industrial coatings with modern performance standards.
products.imageAlt: VK warehouse operator presenting a Steelux automotive and industrial coating can

products.name: DANKDEUTZ
products.desc: DANKDEUTZ Body Filler is a high-quality polyester filler that is easy to apply and sand, providing a smooth vehicle body surface before painting.
products.imageAlt: Dank Deutz Carroserie Polyester Putty pail held by a VK warehouse operator

categories.heading: Marine, Offshore & Protective
categories.lede: Industrial-grade protective coatings designed for the harshest environments — from offshore platforms to heavy steel structures.

products.name: VIKTRONOX
products.desc: Viktronox provides high-quality coating protection for marine, offshore, and extreme industrial environments.
products.imageAlt: Barge hull coated with Viktronox marine protective coating

products.name: MAXTRAK
products.desc: Maxtrak is a two-component epoxy floor coating system designed for maximum protection and a professional concrete finish.
products.imageAlt: Industrial warehouse floor finished with Maxtrak epoxy floor coating

categories.heading: Architectural Coatings
categories.lede: Premium decorative and protective coatings for residential, commercial, and large-scale construction projects across Indonesia.

products.name: VELORA
products.desc: Velora is a premium decorative paint designed for interior and exterior wall applications, suitable for both new surfaces and previously painted substrates.
products.imageAlt: FOX Lite hotel exterior finished with Velora architectural coatings

services.heading: Technical Services
services.lede: Every VK product is backed by an integrated service model — from formulation to on-site application support.

cards.title: R&D & Technical Service
cards.desc: Dedicated team focused on product quality improvement, new formulations, and application innovation.

cards.title: Color Science & Matching
cards.desc: Multi-angle spectrophotometry and chroma metering for precise color matching.

cards.title: Superior Distribution
cards.desc: Extensive distribution network with modern management systems — delivering reliably across Indonesia.

ctaBand.label: Product Consultation
ctaBand.heading: Need the right coating system for your application?
